description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer with a large, rectangular, solid head made of a brownish material, likely metal, designed for delivering powerful blows. The head features flat striking faces on both ends, with slightly beveled edges for durability and impact resistance. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of a darker brown material, possibly wood, providing a firm grip and shock absorption. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners or joints, suggesting a secure fit. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or branding, emphasizing function over form. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a solid rectangular head and a straight, dark brown handle, built for powerful impacts. The design is simple, functional, and free of visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed from the top, showing the rounded end of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is seen from the side, highlighting the full rectangular face of the head and the length of the handle.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, again showing the top of the head and the straight handle beneath.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, displaying the opposite side of the rectangular head and the handle.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peens
